rationale: The cited paper is a domain-core predecessor: it provides the foundational theory and evidence on dollars-plus-miles (combined-currency) payment choice and perceived cost in airline loyalty settings, which directly overlaps the citing paper’s money-versus-points redemption context. The citing note explicitly positions itself as extending prior loyalty redemption work on fixed point-money exchange rates, making this 2004 JMR article a plausible theory/benchmark source rather than a generic mention. With this conceptual and contextual alignment, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
